177: 		delegate:  delegateHandler,
178: 	}
179: 	groupDiscoveryHandler := &groupDiscoveryHandler{
180: 		discovery: map[string]*discovery.APIGroupHandler{},
181: 		delegate:  delegateHandler,
182: 	}
183: 	establishingController := establish.NewEstablishingController(s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(), crdClient.ApiextensionsV1())
184: 	crdHandler, err := NewCustomResourceDefinitionHandler(
185: 		versionDiscoveryHandler,
186: 		groupDiscoveryHandler,
187: 		s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(),
188: 		delegateHandler,
189: 		c.ExtraConfig.CRDRESTOptionsGetter,
190: 		c.GenericConfig.AdmissionControl,
191: 		establishingController,
192: 		c.ExtraConfig.ServiceResolver,
193: 		c.ExtraConfig.AuthResolverWrapper,
194: 		c.ExtraConfig.MasterCount,
195: 		s.GenericAPIServer.Authorizer,
196: 		c.GenericConfig.RequestTimeout,
197: 		time.Duration(c.GenericConfig.MinRequestTimeout)*time.Second,
198: 		apiGroupInfo.StaticOpenAPISpec,
199: 		c.GenericConfig.MaxRequestBodyBytes,
200: 	)
201: 	if err != nil {
202: 		return nil, err
203: 	}
204: 	s.GenericAPIServer.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux.Handle("/apis", crdHandler)
205: 	s.GenericAPIServer.Handler.NonGoRestfulMux.HandlePrefix("/apis/", crdHandler)
206: 	s.GenericAPIServer.RegisterDestroyFunc(crdHandler.destroy)
207: 
208: 	aggregatedDiscoveryManager := genericServer.AggregatedDiscoveryGroupManager
209: 	if aggregatedDiscoveryManager != nil {
210: 		aggregatedDiscoveryManager = aggregatedDiscoveryManager.WithSource(aggregated.CRDSource)
211: 	}
212: 	discoveryController := NewDiscoveryController(s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(), versionDiscoveryHandler, groupDiscoveryHandler, aggregatedDiscoveryManager)
213: 	namingController := status.NewNamingConditionController(s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(), crdClient.ApiextensionsV1())
214: 	nonStructuralSchemaController := nonstructuralschema.NewConditionController(s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(), crdClient.ApiextensionsV1())
215: 	apiApprovalController := apiapproval.NewKubernetesAPIApprovalPolicyConformantConditionController(s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(), crdClient.ApiextensionsV1())
216: 	finalizingController := finalizer.NewCRDFinalizer(
217: 		s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions(),
218: 		crdClient.ApiextensionsV1(),
219: 		crdHandler,
220: 	)
221: 
222: 	s.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie("start-apiextensions-informers", func(hookContext genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {
223: 		s.Informers.Start(hookContext.Done())
224: 		return nil
225: 	})
226: 	s.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie("start-apiextensions-controllers", func(hookContext genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {
227: 		// OpenAPIVersionedService and StaticOpenAPISpec are populated in generic apiserver PrepareRun().
228: 		// Together they serve the /openapi/v2 endpoint on a generic apiserver. A generic apiserver may
229: 		// choose to not enable OpenAPI by having null openAPIConfig, and thus OpenAPIVersionedService
230: 		// and StaticOpenAPISpec are both null. In that case we don't run the CRD OpenAPI controller.
231: 		if s.GenericAPIServer.StaticOpenAPISpec != nil {
232: 			if s.GenericAPIServer.OpenAPIVersionedService != nil {
233: 				openapiController := openapicontroller.NewController(s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions())
234: 				go openapiController.Run(s.GenericAPIServer.StaticOpenAPISpec, s.GenericAPIServer.OpenAPIVersionedService, hookContext.Done())
235: 			}
236: 
237: 			if s.GenericAPIServer.OpenAPIV3VersionedService != nil {
238: 				openapiv3Controller := openapiv3controller.NewController(s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions())
239: 				go openapiv3Controller.Run(s.GenericAPIServer.OpenAPIV3VersionedService, hookContext.Done())
240: 			}
241: 		}
242: 
243: 		go namingController.Run(hookContext.Done())
244: 		go establishingController.Run(hookContext.Done())
245: 		go nonStructuralSchemaController.Run(5, hookContext.Done())
246: 		go apiApprovalController.Run(5, hookContext.Done())
247: 		go finalizingController.Run(5, hookContext.Done())
248: 
249: 		discoverySyncedCh := make(chan struct{})
250: 		go discoveryController.Run(hookContext.Done(), discoverySyncedCh)
251: 		select {
252: 		case <-hookContext.Done():
253: 		case <-discoverySyncedCh:
254: 		}
255: 
256: 		return nil
257: 	})
258: 	// we don't want to report healthy until we can handle all CRDs that have already been registered.  Waiting for the informer
259: 	// to sync makes sure that the lister will be valid before we begin.  There may still be races for CRDs added after startup,
260: 	// but we won't go healthy until we can handle the ones already present.
261: 	s.GenericAPIServer.AddPostStartHookOrDie("crd-informer-synced", func(context genericapiserver.PostStartHookContext) error {
262: 		return wait.PollImmediateUntil(100*time.Millisecond, func() (bool, error) {
263: 			if s.Informers.Apiextensions().V1().CustomResourceDefinitions().Informer().HasSynced() {
264: 				close(hasCRDInformerSyncedSignal)
265: 				return true, nil
266: 			}
267: 			return false, nil
268: 		}, context.Done())
269: 	})
270: 
271: 	return s, nil
272: }

274: func DefaultAPIResourceConfigSource() *serverstorage.ResourceConfig {
275: 	ret := serverstorage.NewResourceConfig()
276: 	// NOTE: GroupVersions listed here will be enabled by default. Don't put alpha versions in the list.
277: 	ret.EnableVersions(
278: 		v1beta1.SchemeGroupVersion,
279: 		v1.SchemeGroupVersion,
280: 	)
281: 
282: 	return ret
283: }

nil\n312: \t}\n313: \n314: \tallErrs := field.ErrorList{}\n315: \n316: \tallErrs = append(allErrs, validateValueValidation(\u0026v.ValueValidation, skipAnyOf, skipAllOfAnyOf, lvl, fldPath, len(v.ForbiddenGenerics.Type) \u003e 0 {\n324: \t\tallErrs = append(allErrs, field.Forbidden(fldPath.Child(\"type\"), \"must be empty to be structural\"))\n325: \t}\n326: \tif v.AdditionalProperties 17: package schema
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"fmt"
21: 	"reflect"
22: 	"regexp"
23: 	"sort"
24: 
25: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/validation/field"
26: )
27: 
28: var intOrStringAnyOf = []NestedValueValidation{
29: 	{ForbiddenGenerics: Generic{
30: 		Type: "integer",
31: 	}},
32: 	{ForbiddenGenerics: Generic{
33: 		Type: "string",
34: 	}},
35: }
36: 
37: type level int
38: 
39: const (
40: 	rootLevel level = iota
41: 	itemLevel
42: 	fieldLevel
43: )
44: 
45: type ValidationOptions struct {
46: 	// AllowNestedAdditionalProperties allows additionalProperties to be specified in
47: 	// nested contexts (allOf, anyOf, oneOf, not).
48: 	AllowNestedAdditionalProperties bool
49: 
50: 	// AllowNestedXValidations allows x-kubernetes-validations to be specified in
51: 	// nested contexts (allOf, anyOf, oneOf, not).
52: 	AllowNestedXValidations bool
53: 
54: 	// AllowValidationPropertiesWithAdditionalProperties allows
55: 	// value validations on specific properties that are structually
56: 	// defined by additionalProperties. i.e. additionalProperties in main structural
57: 	// schema, but properties within an allOf.
58: 	AllowValidationPropertiesWithAdditionalProperties bool
59: }
60: 
61: // ValidateStructural checks that s is a structural schema with the invariants:
62: //
63: // * structurality: both `ForbiddenGenerics` and `ForbiddenExtensions` only have zero values, with the two exceptions for IntOrString.
64: // * RawExtension: for every schema with `x-kubernetes-embedded-resource: true`, `x-kubernetes-preserve-unknown-fields: true` and `type: object` are set
65: // * IntOrString: for `x-kubernetes-int-or-string: true` either `type` is empty under `anyOf` and `allOf` or the schema structure is one of these:
66: //
67: //  1. anyOf:
68: //     - type: integer
69: //     - type: string
70: //  2. allOf:
71: //     - anyOf:
72: //     - type: integer
73: //     - type: string
74: //     - ... zero or more
75: //
76: // * every specified field or array in s is also specified outside of value validation.
77: // * metadata at the root can only restrict the name and generateName, and not be specified at all in nested contexts.
78: // * additionalProperties at the root is not allowed.
79: func ValidateStructural(fldPath *field.Path, s *Structural) field.ErrorList {
80: 	return ValidateStructuralWithOptions(fldPath, s, ValidationOptions{
81: 		// This would widen the schema for CRD if set to true, so first few releases will still
82: 		// not admit any. But it can still be used by libraries and
83: 		// declarative validation for native types
84: 		AllowNestedAdditionalProperties:                   false,
85: 		AllowNestedXValidations:                           false,
86: 		AllowValidationPropertiesWithAdditionalProperties: false,
87: 	})
88: }
89: 
90: func ValidateStructuralWithOptions(fldPath *field.Path, s *Structural, opts ValidationOptions) field.ErrorList {
91: 	allErrs := field.ErrorList{}
92: 
93: 	allErrs = append(allErrs, validateStructuralInvariants(s, rootLevel, fldPath, opts)...)
94: 	allErrs = append(allErrs, validateStructuralCompleteness(s, fldPath, opts)...)
95: 
96: 	// sort error messages. Otherwise, the errors slice will change every time due to
97: 	// maps in the types and randomized iteration.
98: 	sort.Slice(allErrs, func(i, j int) bool {
99: 		return allErrs[i].Error() < allErrs[j].Error()
100: 	})
101: 
102: 	return allErrs
103: }
104: 
105: // validateStructuralInvariants checks the invariants of a structural schema.
106: func validateStructuralInvariants(s *Structural, lvl level, fldPath *field.Path, opts ValidationOptions) field.ErrorList {
107: 	if s == nil {
108: 		return nil
109: 	}
110: 
111: 	allErrs := field.ErrorList{}
112: 
113: 	if s.Type == "array" && s.Items == nil {
114: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Required(fldPath.Child("items"), "must be specified"))
115: 	}
116: 	allErrs = append(allErrs, validateStructuralInvariants(s.Items, itemLevel, fldPath.Child("items"), opts)...)
117: 
118: 	for k, v := range s.Properties {
119: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, validateStructuralInvariants(&v, fieldLevel, fldPath.Child("properties").Key(k), opts)...)
120: 	}
121: 
122: 	if s.AdditionalProperties != nil {
123: 		if lvl == rootLevel {
124: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Forbidden(fldPath.Child("additionalProperties"), "must not be used at the root"))
125: 		}
126: 		if s.AdditionalProperties.Structural != nil {
127: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, validateStructuralInvariants(s.AdditionalProperties.Structural, fieldLevel, fldPath.Child("additionalProperties"), opts)...)
128: 		}
129: 	}
130: 
131: 	allErrs = append(allErrs, validateGeneric(&s.Generic, lvl, fldPath)...)
132: 	allErrs = append(allErrs, validateExtensions(&s.Extensions, fldPath)...)
133: 
134: 	// detect the two IntOrString exceptions:
135: 	// 1) anyOf:
136: 	//    - type: integer
137: 	//    - type: string
138: 	// 2) allOf:
139: 	//    - anyOf:
140: 	//      - type: integer
141: 	//      - type: string
142: 	//    - ... zero or more
143: 	skipAnyOf := isIntOrStringAnyOfPattern(s)
144: 	skipFirstAllOfAnyOf := isIntOrStringAllOfPattern(s)
145: 
146: 	allErrs = append(allErrs, validateValueValidation(s.ValueValidation, skipAnyOf, skipFirstAllOfAnyOf, lvl, fldPath, opts)...)
147: 
148: 	checkMetadata := (lvl == rootLevel) || s.XEmbeddedResource
149: 
150: 	if s.XEmbeddedResource && s.Type != "object" {
151: 		if len(s.Type) == 0 {
152: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Required(fldPath.Child("type"), "must be object if x-kubernetes-embedded-resource is true"))
153: 		} else {
154: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Invalid(fldPath.Child("type"), s.Type, "must be object if x-kubernetes-embedded-resource is true"))
155: 		}
156: 	} else if len(s.Type) == 0 && !s.Extensions.XIntOrString && !s.Extensions.XPreserveUnknownFields {
157: 		switch lvl {
158: 		case rootLevel:
159: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Required(fldPath.Child("type"), "must not be empty at the root"))
160: 		case itemLevel:
161: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Required(fldPath.Child("type"), "must not be empty for specified array items"))
162: 		case fieldLevel:
163: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Required(fldPath.Child("type"), "must not be empty for specified object fields"))
164: 		}
165: 	}
166: 	if s.XEmbeddedResource && s.AdditionalProperties != nil {
167: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Forbidden(fldPath.Child("additionalProperties"), "must not be used if x-kubernetes-embedded-resource is set"))
168: 	}
169: 
170: 	if lvl == rootLevel && len(s.Type) > 0 && s.Type != "object" {
171: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Invalid(fldPath.Child("type"), s.Type, "must be object at the root"))
172: 	}
173: 
174: 	// restrict metadata schemas to name and generateName only
175: 	if kind, found := s.Properties["kind"]; found && checkMetadata {
176: 		if kind.Type != "string" {
177: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Invalid(fldPath.Child("properties").Key("kind").Child("type"), kind.Type, "must be string"))
178: 		}
179: 	}
180: 	if apiVersion, found := s.Properties["apiVersion"]; found && checkMetadata {
181: 		if apiVersion.Type != "string" {
182: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Invalid(fldPath.Child("properties").Key("apiVersion").Child("type"), apiVersion.Type, "must be string"))
183: 		}
184: 	}
185: 
186: 	if metadata, found := s.Properties["metadata"]; found {
187: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, validateStructuralMetadataInvariants(&metadata, checkMetadata, lvl, fldPath.Child("properties").Key("metadata"))...)
188: 	}
189: 
190: 	if s.XEmbeddedResource && !s.XPreserveUnknownFields && len(s.Properties) == 0 {
191: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Required(fldPath.Child("properties"), "must not be empty if x-kubernetes-embedded-resource is true without x-kubernetes-preserve-unknown-fields"))
192: 	}
193: 
194: 	return allErrs
195: }
196: 
197: func validateStructuralMetadataInvariants(s *Structural, checkMetadata bool, lvl level, fldPath *field.Path) field.ErrorList {
198: 	allErrs := field.ErrorList{}
199: 
200: 	if checkMetadata && s.Type != "object" {
201: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Invalid(fldPath.Child("type"), s.Type, "must be object"))
202: 	}
203: 
204: 	if lvl == rootLevel {
205: 		// metadata is a shallow copy. We can mutate it.
206: 		_, foundName := s.Properties["name"]
207: 		_, foundGenerateName := s.Properties["generateName"]
208: 		if foundName && foundGenerateName && len(s.Properties) == 2 {
209: 			s.Properties = nil
210: 		} else if (foundName || foundGenerateName) && len(s.Properties) == 1 {
211: 			s.Properties = nil
212: 		}
213: 		s.Type = ""
214: 		s.Default.Object = nil // this is checked in API validation (and also tested)
215: 		if s.ValueValidation == nil {
216: 			s.ValueValidation = &ValueValidation{}
217: 		}
218: 		if !reflect.DeepEqual(*s, Structural{ValueValidation: &ValueValidation{}}) {
219: 			// TODO: this is actually a field.Invalid error, but we cannot do JSON serialization of metadata here to get a proper message
220: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Forbidden(fldPath, "must not specify anything other than name and generateName, but metadata is implicitly specified"))
221: 		}
222: 	}
223: 
224: 	return allErrs
225: }
226: 
227: func isIntOrStringAnyOfPattern(s *Structural) bool {
228: 	if s == nil || s.ValueValidation == nil {
229: 		return false
230: 	}
231: 	return len(s.ValueValidation.AnyOf) == 2 && reflect.DeepEqual(s.ValueValidation.AnyOf, intOrStringAnyOf)
232: }
233: 
234: func isIntOrStringAllOfPattern(s *Structural) bool {
235: 	if s == nil || s.ValueValidation == nil {
236: 		return false
237: 	}
238: 	return len(s.ValueValidation.AllOf) >= 1 && len(s.ValueValidation.AllOf[0].AnyOf) == 2 && reflect.DeepEqual(s.ValueValidation.AllOf[0].AnyOf, intOrStringAnyOf)
239: }
240: 
241: // validateGeneric checks the generic fields of a structural schema.
242: func validateGeneric(g *Generic, lvl level, fldPath *field.Path) field.ErrorList {
243: 	if g == nil {
244: 		return nil
245: 	}
246: 
247: 	return nil
248: }
249: 
250: // validateExtensions checks Kubernetes vendor extensions of a structural schema.
251: func validateExtensions(x *Extensions, fldPath *field.Path) field.ErrorList {
252: 	allErrs := field.ErrorList{}
253: 
254: 	if x.XIntOrString && x.XPreserveUnknownFields {
255: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Invalid(fldPath.Child("x-kubernetes-preserve-unknown-fields"), x.XPreserveUnknownFields, "must be false if x-kubernetes-int-or-string is true"))
256: 	}
257: 	if x.XIntOrString && x.XEmbeddedResource {
258: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Invalid(fldPath.Child("x-kubernetes-embedded-resource"), x.XEmbeddedResource, "must be false if x-kubernetes-int-or-string is true"))
259: 	}
260: 
261: 	return allErrs
262: }
263: 
264: // validateValueValidation checks the value validation in a structural schema.
265: func validateValueValidation(v *ValueValidation, skipAnyOf, skipFirstAllOfAnyOf bool, lvl level, fldPath *field.Path, opts ValidationOptions) field.ErrorList {
266: 	if v == nil {
267: 		return nil
268: 	}
269: 
270: 	allErrs := field.ErrorList{}
271: 
272: 	// We still unconditionally forbid XValidations in quantifiers, the only
273: 	// quantifier that is allowed to have right now is AllOf. This is due to
274: 	// implementation constraints - the SchemaValidator would need to become
275: 	// aware of CEL to properly implement the other quantifiers.
276: 	optsWithCELDisabled := opts
277: 	optsWithCELDisabled.AllowNestedXValidations = false
278: 
279: 	if !skipAnyOf {
280: 		for i := range v.AnyOf {
281: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, validateNestedValueValidation(&v.AnyOf[i], false, false, lvl, fldPath.Child("anyOf").Index(i), optsWithCELDisabled)...)
282: 		}
283: 	}
284: 
285: 	for i := range v.AllOf {
286: 		skipAnyOf := false
287: 		if skipFirstAllOfAnyOf && i == 0 {
288: 			skipAnyOf = true
289: 		}
290: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, validateNestedValueValidation(&v.AllOf[i], skipAnyOf, false, lvl, fldPath.Child("allOf").Index(i), opts)...)
291: 	}
292: 
293: 	for i := range v.OneOf {
294: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, validateNestedValueValidation(&v.OneOf[i], false, false, lvl, fldPath.Child("oneOf").Index(i), optsWithCELDisabled)...)
295: 	}
296: 
297: 	allErrs = append(allErrs, validateNestedValueValidation(v.Not, false, false, lvl, fldPath.Child("not"), optsWithCELDisabled)...)
298: 
299: 	if len(v.Pattern) > 0 {
300: 		if _, err := regexp.Compile(v.Pattern); err != nil {
301: 			allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Invalid(fldPath.Child("pattern"), v.Pattern, fmt.Sprintf("must be a valid regular expression, but isn't: %v", err)))
302: 		}
303: 	}
304: 
305: 	return allErrs
306: }
307: 
308: // validateNestedValueValidation checks the nested value validation under a logic junctor in a structural schema.
309: func validateNestedValueValidation(v *NestedValueValidation, skipAnyOf, skipAllOfAnyOf bool, lvl level, fldPath *field.Path, opts ValidationOptions) field.ErrorList {
310: 	if v == nil {
311: 		return nil
312: 	}
313: 
314: 	allErrs := field.ErrorList{}
315: 
316: 	allErrs = append(allErrs, validateValueValidation(&v.ValueValidation, skipAnyOf, skipAllOfAnyOf, lvl, fldPath, opts)...)
317: 	allErrs = append(allErrs, validateNestedValueValidation(v.Items, false, false, lvl, fldPath.Child("items"), opts)...)
318: 
319: 	for k, fld := range v.Properties {
320: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, validateNestedValueValidation(&fld, false, false, fieldLevel, fldPath.Child("properties").Key(k), opts)...)
321: 	}
322: 
323: 	if len(v.ForbiddenGenerics.Type) > 0 {
324: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Forbidden(fldPath.Child("type"), "must be empty to be structural"))
325: 	}
326: 	if v.AdditionalProperties != nil && !opts.AllowNestedAdditionalProperties {
327: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Forbidden(fldPath.Child("additionalProperties"), "must be undefined to be structural"))
328: 	} else {
329: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, validateNestedValueValidation(v.AdditionalProperties, false, false, lvl, fldPath.Child("additionalProperties"), opts)...)
330: 	}
331: 	if v.ForbiddenGenerics.Default.Object != nil {
332: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Forbidden(fldPath.Child("default"), "must be undefined to be structural"))
333: 	}
334: 	if len(v.ForbiddenGenerics.Title) > 0 {
335: 		allErrs = append(allErrs, field.Forbidden(fldPath.Child("title"), "must be empty to be structural"))
336: 	}
337: 	if len(v.ForbiddenGenerics.Description) > 0 {

I am thinking...: Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the CRD validation schema to OpenAPI schema publishing chain. Let me organize my findings:

## The Chain

### 1. CRD Validation Spec (Type Definitions)
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/types.go`** - Internal types: `CustomResourceDefinition`, `CustomResourceDefinitionSpec`, `CustomResourceValidation`, `JSONSchemaProps`
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1/types.go`** - v1 API types: `CustomResourceDefinition`, `CustomResourceValidation`, `JSONSchemaProps`
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1beta1/types.go`** - v1beta1 API types

### 2. CRD Validation (Admission/API Validation)
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/validation.go`** - `ValidateCustomResourceDefinitionOpenAPISchema` - validates the CRD schema at admission time
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/cel_validation.go`** - CEL validation context

### 3. Structural Schema Extraction
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/convert.go`** - `NewStructural()` - converts `apiextensions.JSONSchemaProps` to `Structural` schema
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/structural.go`** - `Structural` type definition
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/validation.go`** - `ValidateStructural()` - validates structural schema invariants
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/kubeopenapi.go`** - `ToKubeOpenAPI()` - converts `Structural` to `spec.Schema`

### 4. OpenAPI Schema Conversion
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/validation/validation.go`** - `ConvertJSONSchemaPropsWithPostProcess()` - converts `JSONSchemaProps` to `spec.Schema` (go-openapi)
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/v2/conversion.go`** - `ToStructuralOpenAPIV2()` - converts structural schema to OpenAPI v2 compatible schema
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/builder/builder.go`** - `generateBuilder()`, `BuildOpenAPIV2()`, `BuildOpenAPIV3()`, `buildKubeNative()` - builds OpenAPI spec from CRD
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/builder/merge.go`** - `MergeSpecs()`, `MergeSpecsV3()` - merges CRD specs with static spec

### 5. API Server Spec Endpoint Publication
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/controller.go`** - `Controller` - watches CRDs and publishes OpenAPI v2 spec via `openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy()`
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapiv3/controller.go`** - `Controller` - watches CRDs and publishes OpenAPI v3 spec via `openAPIV3Service.UpdateGroupVersion()`
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/apiserver.go`** - `New()` - wires up the controllers and starts them

### Helper Files
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apihelpers/helpers.go`** - `GetSchemaForVersion()` - retrieves schema for a specific version

## The Full Chain

1. **CRD Spec** (`types.go`) → defines `CustomResourceValidation.OpenAPIV3Schema` as `*JSONSchemaProps`
2. **Validation** (`validation/validation.go`) → `ValidateCustomResourceDefinitionOpenAPISchema()` validates the schema at admission
3. **Schema Extraction** (`schema/convert.go`) → `NewStructural()` converts `JSONSchemaProps` to `Structural`
4. **OpenAPI Builder** (`controller/openapi/builder/builder.go`) → `generateBuilder()` calls `NewStructural()`, then `buildKubeNative()` calls `schema.ToKubeOpenAPI()` to get `spec.Schema`
5. **OpenAPI v2 Conversion** (`controller/openapi/v2/conversion.go`) → `ToStructuralOpenAPIV2()` strips v3-only fields
6. **Spec Building** (`builder/builder.go`) → `BuildOpenAPIV2()` / `BuildOpenAPIV3()` builds full OpenAPI spec
7. **Spec Merging** (`builder/merge.go`) → `MergeSpecs()` / `MergeSpecsV3()` merges CRD specs with static spec
8. **Publication** (`controller/openapi/controller.go`) → `updateSpecLocked()` calls `openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy()` to publish
9. **Publication v3** (`controller/openapiv3/controller.go`) → `updateGroupVersion()` calls `openAPIV3Service.UpdateGroupVersion()` to publish
10. **Wiring** (`apiserver/apiserver.go`) → `New()` starts both controllers

The key functions in the chain:
- `ValidateCustomResourceDefinitionOpenAPISchema` (validation/validation.go)
- `NewStructural` (schema/convert.go)
- `ValidateStructural` (schema/validation.go)
- `generateBuilder` (builder/builder.go)
- `buildKubeNative` (builder/builder.go)
- `ToKubeOpenAPI` (schema/kubeopenapi.go)
- `ToStructuralOpenAPIV2` (v2/conversion.go)
- `BuildOpenAPIV2` (builder/builder.go)
- `BuildOpenAPIV3` (builder/builder.go)
- `MergeSpecs` (builder/merge.go)
- `MergeSpecsV3` (builder/merge.go)
- `updateSpecLocked` (controller/openapi/controller.go)
- `updateGroupVersion` (controller/openapiv3/controller.go)
- `New` (apiserver/apiserver.go)

All files are in the `sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0` repo under `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/`.

  "text": "The CRD validation schema to OpenAPI schema publishing chain in kubernetes/kubernetes (sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0) spans several packages under staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/.\n\n## 1. CRD Validation Spec (Type Definitions)\n\nThe CRD validation schema is defined in two layers:\n- **Internal types** (`pkg/apis/apiextensions/types.go`): `CustomResourceDefinition`, `CustomResourceDefinitionSpec` (with `Validation *CustomResourceValidation`), `CustomResourceValidation` (with `OpenAPIV3Schema *JSONSchemaProps`), and `JSONSchemaProps` (the full OpenAPI v3 schema type).\n- **v1 API types** (`pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1/types.go`): The versioned equivalents with JSON tags, including `CustomResourceValidation.OpenAPIV3Schema *JSONSchemaProps`.\n- **v1beta1 API types** (`pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1beta1/types.go`): Legacy versioned types.\n\n## 2. CRD Validation at Admission\n\n- **`pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/validation.go`**: `ValidateCustomResourceDefinitionOpenAPISchema()` validates the CRD's OpenAPI v3 schema at admission time, checking structural invariants, CEL rules, and other constraints.\n- **`pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/cel_validation.go`**: `CELSchemaContext` provides CEL validation context used during CRD schema validation.\n\n## 3. Structural Schema Extraction\n\n- **`pkg/apiserver/schema/structural.go`**: Defines the `Structural` type — an internal representation of a structural schema, with `Generic`, `Extensions`, `ValidationExtensions`, and `ValueValidation` sub-types.\n- **`pkg/apiserver/schema/convert.go`**: `NewStructural()` converts an `apiextensions.JSONSchemaProps` (the CRD's OpenAPI v3 schema) into a `Structural` schema. This is the key extraction step.\n- **`pkg/apiserver/schema/validation.go`**: `ValidateStructural()` validates that the extracted structural schema meets all structural invariants (types specified everywhere, no forbidden fields in value validation contexts, etc.).\n- **`pkg/apiserver/schema/kubeopenapi.go`**: `ToKubeOpenAPI()` converts a `Structural` schema back to a `spec.Schema` (go-openapi/kube-openapi format), faithfully and roundtrippably.\n\n## 4. OpenAPI Schema Conversion\n\n- **`pkg/apiserver/validation/validation.go`**: `ConvertJSONSchemaPropsWithPostProcess()` directly converts `apiextensions.JSONSchemaProps` to `spec.Schema` (used for runtime validation via `NewSchemaValidator()`). `NewSchemaValidator()` creates a kube-openapi schema validator from the CRD's JSONSchemaProps.\n- **`pkg/controller/openapi/v2/conversion.go`**: `ToStructuralOpenAPIV2()` converts a `Structural` schema to an OpenAPI v2-compatible structural schema by stripping v3-only fields (allOf, oneOf, anyOf, not, nullable, etc.).\n- **`pkg/controller/openapi/builder/builder.go`**: The central builder:\n  - `generateBuilder()`: Calls `apiextensionshelpers.GetSchemaForVersion()` to get the CRD's validation schema, converts it to internal format, calls `NewStructural()` to get a structural schema, optionally calls `Unfold()`, `StripValueValidations()`, `StripNullable()`, then creates a `builder` struct.\n  - `buildKubeNative()`: Calls `ToStructuralOpenAPIV2()` (for v2) or uses the structural schema directly, then calls `schema.ToKubeOpenAPI()` to get a `spec.Schema`, and adds Kubernetes-native metadata properties (ObjectMeta, TypeMeta).\n  - `BuildOpenAPIV2()`: Calls `generateBuilder()` then `openapibuilder.BuildOpenAPISpecFromRoutes()` to produce a `*spec.Swagger`.\n  - `BuildOpenAPIV3()`: Calls `generateBuilder()` then `builder3.BuildOpenAPISpecFromRoutes()` to produce a `*spec3.OpenAPI`.\n- **`pkg/controller/openapi/builder/merge.go`**: `MergeSpecs()` merges CRD OpenAPI v2 specs with the static server spec. `MergeSpecsV3()` merges CRD OpenAPI v3 specs.\n\n## 5. API Server Spec Endpoint Publication\n\n- **`pkg/controller/openapi/controller.go`**: The `Controller` watches CRDs via informers. On CRD add/update/delete, it calls `createSpecCache()` which lazily calls `builder.BuildOpenAPIV2()` for each served version. `updateSpecLocked()` merges all CRD specs with the static spec and calls `openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy()` to publish the merged spec to the `/openapi/v2` endpoint.\n- **`pkg/controller/openapiv3/controller.go`**: The `Controller` watches CRDs for OpenAPI v3. `buildV3Spec()` calls `builder.BuildOpenAPIV3()`. `updateGroupVersion()` calls `builder.MergeSpecsV3()` and then `openAPIV3Service.UpdateGroupVersion()` to publish per-group-version specs to the `/openapi/v3` endpoint.\n- **`pkg/apiserver/apiserver.go`**: `New()` wires everything together: creates the CRD REST storage, registers the `/apis` handler, and in a PostStartHook starts both the OpenAPI v2 controller (`openapicontroller.NewController()` + `Run()`) and the OpenAPI v3 controller (`openapiv3controller.NewController()` + `Run()`).\n- **`pkg/apihelpers/helpers.go`**: `GetSchemaForVersion()` retrieves the `CustomResourceValidation` for a specific version from a CRD's spec.\n- **`pkg/apiserver/customresource_handler.go`**: `NewCustomResourceDefinitionHandler()` uses `GetSchemaForVersion()` and `NewSchemaValidator()` to set up per-request validation of custom resource instances against the CRD schema.\n\n## Summary of the Chain\n\n1. **CRD spec** (`types.go`) defines `CustomResourceValidation.OpenAPIV3Schema` as `*JSONSchemaProps`.\n2. **Admission validation** (`validation/validation.go:ValidateCustomResourceDefinitionOpenAPISchema`) validates the schema when a CRD is created/updated.\n3. **Schema retrieval** (`apihelpers/helpers.go:GetSchemaForVersion`) fetches the per-version schema from the CRD spec.\n4. **Structural extraction** (`schema/convert.go:NewStructural`) converts `JSONSchemaProps` → `Structural`.\n5. **Structural validation** (`schema/validation.go:ValidateStructural`) checks structural invariants.\n6. **OpenAPI spec building** (`builder/builder.go:generateBuilder` → `buildKubeNative` → `schema/kubeopenapi.go:ToKubeOpenAPI`) converts `Structural` → `spec.Schema`, adding Kubernetes metadata.\n7. **v2 compatibility** (`v2/conversion.go:ToStructuralOpenAPIV2`) strips v3-only fields for OpenAPI v2.\n8. **Full spec generation** (`builder/builder.go:BuildOpenAPIV2` / `BuildOpenAPIV3`) produces complete OpenAPI specs.\n9. **Spec merging** (`builder/merge.go:MergeSpecs` / `MergeSpecsV3`) merges CRD specs with the static server spec.\n10. **Publication** (`controller/openapi/controller.go:updateSpecLocked` → `openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy`) publishes to `/openapi/v2`; (`controller/openapiv3/controller.go:updateGroupVersion` → `openAPIV3Service.UpdateGroupVersion`) publishes to `/openapi/v3`.\n11. **Wiring** (`apiserver/apiserver.go:New`) starts both controllers in PostStartHooks."
}

The chain flows through these key files in `sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0` under `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/`:

1. **Type definitions** (`pkg/apis/apiextensions/types.go`, `v1/types.go`) — `CustomResourceValidation.OpenAPIV3Schema *JSONSchemaProps`
2. **Admission validation** (`pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/validation.go`) — `ValidateCustomResourceDefinitionOpenAPISchema()`
3. **Structural extraction** (`pkg/apiserver/schema/convert.go`) — `NewStructural()` converts `JSONSchemaProps` → `Structural`
4. **Structural validation** (`pkg/apiserver/schema/validation.go`) — `ValidateStructural()`
5. **OpenAPI conversion** (`pkg/apiserver/schema/kubeopenapi.go`) — `ToKubeOpenAPI()` converts `Structural` → `spec.Schema`
6. **v2 compatibility** (`pkg/controller/openapi/v2/conversion.go`) — `ToStructuralOpenAPIV2()`
7. **Spec building** (`pkg/controller/openapi/builder/builder.go`) — `generateBuilder()`, `buildKubeNative()`, `BuildOpenAPIV2()`, `BuildOpenAPIV3()`
8. **Spec merging** (`pkg/controller/openapi/builder/merge.go`) — `MergeSpecs()`, `MergeSpecsV3()`
9. **Publication v2** (`pkg/controller/openapi/controller.go`) — `updateSpecLocked()` → `openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy()`
10. **Publication v3** (`pkg/controller/openapiv3/controller.go`) — `updateGroupVersion()` → `openAPIV3Service.UpdateGroupVersion()`
11. **Wiring** (`pkg/apiserver/apiserver.go`) — `New()` starts both controllers in PostStartHooks
